title: Sakana Fugu (Fully Tested - V/S Fable): UHM... REALLY?
summary: Sakana Fugu is a multi-agent orchestration system that routes requests across models. It comes in two versions: Fugu and Fugu Ultra. While Fugu Ultra performs well on benchmarks like Terminal Bench and LiveCodeBench, it underperforms Fable 5 on SWE Bench Pro and Humanity's Last Exam. Hidden orchestration costs and weak practical performance on coding tasks limit its current viability as a direct Fable replacement.
writeup: The video tests Sakana Fugu, a multi-agent orchestration system that routes requests across models, and compares it against Fable. Fugu ships in two versions, Fugu and Fugu Ultra, where Ultra scores well on Terminal Bench and LiveCodeBench but trails Fable 5 on SWE Bench Pro and Humanity's Last Exam. The takeaway: hidden orchestration costs and weak practical coding performance limit Fugu's current viability as a direct Fable replacement.
